content:
I'll count the classes and interfaces defined in the mermaid package files from the code above.

From the code:

1. `MermaidAutoRepair` (auto-repair.js)
2. `CommentGenerator` (comment-generator.js)
3. `CppPackageFlowchartGenerator` (cpp package flowchart)
4. `MermaidDiagramGenerator` (diagram-generator.js)
5. `ValidatedMermaidGenerator` (generator.js)
6. `HeuristicGrouper` (grouper.js)
7. `MermaidValidationPipeline` (validation-pipeline.js)
8. `MermaidParseValidator` (validator-parse.js)
9. `QualityValidator` (validator-quality.js)
10. `RenderValidator` (validator-render.js)
11. `StructuralValidator` (validator-structural.js)
12. `IsomorphicMermaidRenderer` (renderer.js)
13. `MermaidRenderWorkerPool` (render-worker-pool.js)
14. `NoopProgressReporter` (progress.js)
15. `TestCoverageRenderer` (test-coverage-renderer.js)

Interfaces (exported):
1. `IProgressReporter`
2. `MermaidOutputOptions`
3. `RenderJob` (diagram-generator.js)

{"answer": 18}
